name: K92 Mining Inc.
description: K92 Mining Inc. is a Canadian-based gold mining company focused on the operation and expansion of the Kainantu Gold Mine in the Eastern Highlands Province of Papua New Guinea. The company is engaged in the production of gold, copper, and silver from its high-grade deposits, specifically the Kora and Judd vein systems. K92 is committed to sustainable development and safety while executing a multi-stage expansion project to significantly increase production capacity. The company's strategic focus remains on exploration and resource growth within its expansive and highly prospective land package.

investment_theses.company_type: Junior Gold Producer / Papua New Guinea
